executionHistory.summary: spec.md authored to close MIT-040-S-008 routing (carry-forward from MIT-040-S-003 partial closure at commit 4e399a4) plus MIT-038-S-003 (cloud-drive Connect body-sourced owner_user_id) plus the actor-source segment of MIT-027-TRACE-001 (annotation actor_source). Spec scopes the foundation-level per-user bearer-auth trust boundary: per-user token issuance contract (admin-issued for MVP; self-service signup out-of-scope), stateless validation on the hot path with no DB roundtrip per request (NFR-AUTH-001 ≤5ms p99), claim-binding for actor_id / owner_user_id / actor_source derivation in production (rejecting body/header trust), rotation with SST-configured grace window (NFR-AUTH-003 ≥24h default), revocation with ≤60s propagation budget across instances (NFR-AUTH-006), and a non-disruptive backward-compatibility contract that keeps SMACKEREL_AUTH_TOKEN fully valid for development/test profiles (FR-AUTH-015..017). Outcome Contract authored with concrete Intent / Success Signal / Hard Constraints / Failure Condition (no DB roundtrip, claim-binding only in production, dev/test backward compat, fail-loud on missing config, SST flow, MIT closures in scope). 11 Gherkin scenarios authored: SCN-AUTH-001 (enrollment issuance), SCN-AUTH-002 (stateless validation no DB), SCN-AUTH-003 (actor_id from claims not header trust), SCN-AUTH-004 (rotation with grace window), SCN-AUTH-005 (SMACKEREL_AUTH_TOKEN dev/test backward compat), SCN-AUTH-006 (fail-loud on missing config), SCN-AUTH-007 (drive Connect owner_user_id closes MIT-038-S-003), SCN-AUTH-008 (annotation actor_source closes MIT-027-TRACE-001 actor segment), SCN-AUTH-009 (revocation refused on next request), SCN-AUTH-010 (stale/tampered token constant-time refusal), SCN-AUTH-011 (dev/test migration zero-changes). 21 functional requirements (FR-AUTH-001..021) covering issuance/validation/claim-binding/rotation/revocation/backward-compat/configuration/closure-routing. 8 non-functional requirements (NFR-AUTH-001..008): hot-path latency budget, no-DB-roundtrip, ≥24h rotation grace default, at-rest hashing for stored tokens, ≤60s clock-skew, ≤60s revocation propagation, log hygiene, constant-time comparison. 11 acceptance criteria (AC-1..11) with explicit grep verification (AC-11) of header-trust path elimination in production. Backward Compatibility section enumerates the development/test no-changes contract and the production migration steps. Security Considerations surfaces token format / signing key storage / transport / replay / cross-spec QF boundary topics for design. Product Principle Alignment cites Principles 1/6/8/10 (P10 NON-NEGOTIABLE QF cross-product) plus Constitution C1/C5/C7/C8 (advisory pre-ratification). 10 design-owned Open Questions recorded (OQ-1 token format JWT/PASETO/opaque, OQ-2 key management, OQ-3 session context shape, OQ-4 revocation propagation mechanism, OQ-5 coexistence policy, OQ-6 enrollment surface, OQ-7 web UI session model, OQ-8 hashing strategy, OQ-9 telemetry, OQ-10 bootstrapping). Cross-references upstream MIT-040-S-008 / MIT-040-S-003 partial close / MIT-038-S-003 / MIT-027-TRACE-001 and adjacent ratified specs 020 / 040 / 038 / 027. No design.md or scopes.md authored — those are bubbles.design and bubbles.plan ownership respectively per task scope. uservalidation.md and report.md not authored — owned by later-phase agents.

executionHistory.agent: bubbles.design (parent-expanded from bubbles.goal due to nested-runtime network timeout)
executionHistory.summary: design.md authored — 900 lines, 13 sections covering: (1) Design Brief, (2) System Context (16 components affected), (3) Component Diagram (ASCII), (4) Configuration Plan (14 new SST keys under auth.* block), (5) Token Lifecycle (issuance/validation/rotation/revocation/claim-binding/session-context-shape/enrollment-surface), (6) Hot-Path Validation Anatomy (full middleware code path + PASETO verify + revocation cache + NATS broadcaster), (7) Failure Modes (15 failure scenarios with detection/response/test mappings), (8) Performance Budget (10 metrics with budgets and verification approach), (9) Backward Compatibility Plan (dev/test zero-changes + production migration 7-step), (10) Security Considerations (token-format choice rationale, signing key storage, transport, web UI session model, at-rest hashing, replay, constant-time comparison sites, logging hygiene, cross-spec QF boundary), (11) Risks & Mitigations (10 risks), (12) Rollout Plan (4 phases: SST foundation + token subsystem; hot-path middleware integration + MIT closures; web surfaces + Telegram; deprecation + docs), (13) Open Questions Deferred (zero — all 10 OQs resolved). All 10 OQs RESOLVED: OQ-1 PASETO v4.public (rejecting JWT for algorithm-confusion attack surface; rejecting opaque for DB-roundtrip violation), OQ-2 SST signing keys with overlap rotation + key_id in claims, OQ-3 typed auth.Session struct via context.Context with helper accessors, OQ-4 NATS pub/sub on auth.revocations subject + 30s timer DB refresh fallback + cold-start DB bootstrap, OQ-5 production rejects shared token by default with opt-in fallback flag for transition, OQ-6 admin-issued only via CLI + admin HTTP endpoint, OQ-7 preserve cookie-based sessions with HttpOnly + Secure in production, OQ-8 HMAC-SHA-256 with separate at-rest hashing key, OQ-9 telemetry SST keys with smackerel_auth metric prefix tied to spec 030, OQ-10 auth.bootstrap_token SST + ./smackerel.sh auth bootstrap CLI command. New SST keys: auth.token_format, auth.signing.{active_private_key,active_key_id,prior_public_key,prior_key_id}, auth.token_ttl_hours, auth.rotation_grace_window_hours, auth.clock_skew_tolerance_seconds, auth.revocation_cache_refresh_interval_seconds, auth.revocation_nats_subject, auth.at_rest_hashing_key, auth.production_shared_token_fallback_enabled, auth.telemetry_enabled, auth.telemetry_metric_prefix, auth.bootstrap_token (14 total) + per-environment auth.enabled override. Reuses existing runtime.auth_token, runtime.environment, db.url, nats.url, runtime.cookie_domain. Cleanup contract: SMACKEREL_AUTH_TOKEN preserved unconditionally for dev/test; production deprecation pathway via opt-in fallback flag. Library choice: github.com/aidantwoods/go-paseto. Direct create_file fallback used because runSubagent dispatch to bubbles.design timed out with HTTP/2 stream timeout after 300s. No source code, scopes.md, or USER WIP files modified per authority constraints (config/smackerel.yaml is USER WIP; SST changes are documented but not landed). Artifact lint correctly reports missing scopes.md/uservalidation.md/report.md — those are next-phase ownership.

executionHistory.agent: bubbles.plan (parent-expanded from bubbles.goal due to nested-runtime network timeout)
executionHistory.summary: scopes.md, scenario-manifest.json, report.md (placeholder), uservalidation.md (placeholder) authored. Four scopes match design.md §12 rollout plan: Scope 01 SST Foundation + Token Subsystem (FR-AUTH-001/002/003/018/019; covers SCN-AUTH-001/006; 10 Test Plan rows T1-01..T1-10; 9 DoD bullets). Scope 02 Hot-Path Middleware Integration + MIT Closures (FR-AUTH-004..017/020/021; covers SCN-AUTH-002/003/004/005/007/008/009/010; 21 Test Plan rows T2-01..T2-21 including required adversarial regression test TestMintReveal_BodyActorIDInProduction_Returns400_FailsLoudly + AC-11 grep guard; 13 DoD bullets including spec 040/038/027 state.json cross-spec MIT closures). Scope 03 Web Surfaces + Telegram Connector (FR-AUTH-005/010; covers SCN-AUTH-002 PWA path + SCN-AUTH-008 Telegram bridge; 4 Test Plan rows T3-01..T3-04; 4 DoD bullets). Scope 04 Deprecation Pathway + Documentation Freshness (FR-AUTH-017/018; covers SCN-AUTH-011; 4 Test Plan rows T4-01..T4-04; 7 DoD bullets including spec 030 cross-spec metrics integration). All DoD bullets carry Scenario "<SCN-AUTH-NNN ...>": trace prefix per Gate G068. Test Plan rows reference real-or-future test files: internal/config/validate_test.go, internal/auth/{issue,verify,sst_grep_guard}_test.go, internal/auth/revocation/cache_test.go, internal/api/router_test.go, internal/metrics/auth_metrics_test.go, tests/integration/auth_{bootstrap,startup,mintreveal,drive_connect,annotation,rotation,revocation,no_body_header_actor_id}_test.go, tests/e2e/auth/{pwa_per_user,extension_per_user,telegram_per_user,admin_ui}_test.go, specs/{040,038,027}/state.json. Scenario-manifest authored with planned status entries for all 11 SCN-AUTH scenarios. Artifact lint PASSED. Direct create_file fallback used because runSubagent dispatch to bubbles.plan timed out with HTTP/2 stream timeout after 300s. No source code or USER WIP files modified.

Scope 01 SST Foundation + Token Subsystem closed. Landed: (1) 14 SST keys at config/smackerel.yaml lines 67-130 + per-env auth_enabled overrides (dev=false, test=false, home-lab=true); (2) scripts/commands/config.sh emits 16 AUTH_* env keys to config/generated/{dev,test,home-lab}.env via required_value/yaml_get extractions; (3) internal/config/config.go AuthConfig struct + loadAuthConfig with production-mode fail-loud validation (signing private key, key id, hashing key non-empty AND hashing key != signing key per OQ-8); (4) internal/auth/ package: session.go (Session + SessionSource consts + WithSession/SessionFromContext/UserIDFromContext helpers), issue.go (IssueOptions/IssueResult/IssueToken using paseto.NewToken+SetIssuer/Subject/Jti/IssuedAt/NotBefore/Expiration+SetFooter+V4Sign + GenerateSigningKeypair + PublicHexFromSecretHex), verify.go (VerifyOptions/ParsedToken/VerifyAndParse with kid-routed key selection between active and prior keys, custom skew tolerance, sentinel errors), hash.go (HashToken HMAC-SHA-256 hex + CompareTokenHash constant-time), bearer_store.go (BearerStore wrapping pgxpool.Pool with Enroll/CountUsers/ListUsers/PersistToken/MarkTokenRotated/RevokeToken/LoadRevokedTokenIDs), startup.go (RuntimeAuthConfig + ValidateRuntimeAuthStartup defense-in-depth used by cmd/core/wiring.go); (5) internal/auth/revocation/ package: cache.go (Cache backed by sync.Map + atomic size counter; Loader interface; BootstrapFromDB; Refresh delta; MarkRevoked idempotent; IsRevoked lock-free; RunPeriodicRefresh), broadcaster.go (EventV1 envelope; Broadcaster wrapping nats.Conn; defensive handle dropping malformed events); (6) DB migration internal/db/migrations/033_auth_per_user_bearer.sql creating auth_users, auth_tokens, auth_revocations with indexes; (7) cmd/core/cmd_auth.go 410-line subcommand dispatcher: enroll/rotate/revoke/list-users/bootstrap/keygen; main.go dispatch parallel to existing agent subcommand; (8) internal/api/auth_handlers.go 280-line file authoring AuthAdminHandlers with HandleEnroll/HandleRotate/HandleRevoke/HandleListUsers — gated on callerIsAdmin (bootstrap unconditional, shared-token only when env != production OR production_shared_token_fallback_enabled, per-user rejected pending allowlist surface in later scope). Routes NOT registered in router.go per Scope 1 task scope (deferred to Scope 02 alongside bearerAuthMiddleware wiring); (9) cmd/core/wiring.go calls auth.ValidateRuntimeAuthStartup defense-in-depth between SMACKEREL_AUTH_TOKEN guard and config completion. Tests authored: T1-01..T1-03 + 5 production-mode hardening cases at internal/config/validate_test.go (8 sub-tests), T1-04 issue_test.go (RoundTripWithVerify + RejectsMissingFields), T1-05 verify_test.go (RejectsExpiredAndFutureAndForeignIssuer 4 cases), T1-06 verify_test.go (RotationGraceWindow_HonorsPriorKey 3 cases including forged-kid adversarial + RejectsHalfRotationConfig), T1-07 cache_test.go (BootstrapAndPropagate + PropagatesLoaderErrors + RejectsNilLoader), T1-09 startup_test.go (TestValidateRuntimeAuthStartup 8 sub-cases), T1-10 sst_grep_guard_test.go (forbidden-literals scan + adversarial + allowlist + comment-filter validation), T1-08 tests/integration/auth_bootstrap_test.go (TestAuthBootstrap_FreshProduction_EnrollsFirstUser + TestAuthBootstrap_PublicHexDerivation). Validation: go build ./... clean; go vet ./... clean; go vet -tags integration ./tests/integration/... clean; go test -race -count=1 ./internal/auth/... ./internal/config/... ./cmd/core/... → all OK; smackerel.sh check OK (config in sync; env_file drift guard OK; scenario-lint OK 5 registered); smackerel.sh config generate for dev/test/home-lab all clean with all 16 AUTH_* keys propagating. Two pre-existing infra blockers identified and routed: (a) smackerel.sh test integration cannot bring up the test stack because SST-pinned ollama/ollama:0.6 image is missing on Docker Hub (spec 043 follow-up), so live T1-08 was authored + compiles + is unit-test-validatable but not live-executed; (b) smackerel.sh test unit timed out internal/connector/guesthost at 600s under parallel-run contention but guesthost is unchanged in this scope and passes in isolation in 0.6s. Both routed to bubbles.test for follow-up. Scope 02 hot-path middleware integration + MIT closures NOT started — that is the next scope's work.

Spec 044 Scope 01 formal test phase per Gate G022. Five gate commands executed against commit 2e2a2b9c on top of BUG-001 ollama image-pin fix ea2af19a. (Gate 1) ./smackerel.sh check exit=0 — config in sync with SST; env_file drift guard OK; scenario-lint OK (5 registered, 0 rejected). (Gate 2a) ./smackerel.sh test unit --go exit=0 — full Go unit suite PASSES across every internal/* and cmd/* package including the previously-flaky internal/connector/guesthost. internal/auth and internal/auth/revocation produce 0 skips (skip-marker scan returns 1 false-positive comment line in tests/integration/auth_bootstrap_test.go:24 — explanatory header text only, not an actual t.Skip call). (Gate 2b) ./smackerel.sh test unit --python exit=0 — 417 passed in 15.08s on the Python ML sidecar. (Gate 2c) Targeted go test -race -count=1 -v ./internal/auth/... PASS — captures verbose output for T1-04 TestIssueToken_RoundTripWithVerify + 7 RejectsMissingFields sub-tests, T1-05 TestVerifyAndParse_RejectsExpiredAndFutureAndForeignIssuer (sentinel errors ErrTokenExpired / ErrTokenNotYetValid / ErrIssuerMismatch), T1-06 TestVerifyAndParse_RotationGraceWindow_HonorsPriorKey including forged-kid adversarial + foreign-kid ErrUnknownKeyID assertion, T1-09 TestValidateRuntimeAuthStartup 8 sub-cases including all four production+enabled fail-loud branches (empty signing private key → 'AUTH_SIGNING_ACTIVE_PRIVATE_KEY must be set'; empty key id → 'AUTH_SIGNING_ACTIVE_KEY_ID must be set'; empty hashing key → 'AUTH_AT_REST_HASHING_KEY must be set'; hashing key == signing key → 'AUTH_AT_REST_HASHING_KEY must differ from AUTH_SIGNING_ACTIVE_PRIVATE_KEY (spec 044 OQ-8)'), T1-10 sst_grep_guard_test trio (TestSST_NoHardcodedAuthValues + Adversarial + AllowlistAdversarial), T1-07 revocation cache trio. (Gate 3) Live T1-08 — ./smackerel.sh --env test up brings the test stack up cleanly (postgres/nats/smackerel-ml/smackerel-core all Healthy on host ports 47001/47002/45002/45001); go test -count=1 -tags=integration -v -timeout=120s -run 'TestAuth' ./tests/integration/... PASS in 0.087s for both TestAuthBootstrap_FreshProduction_EnrollsFirstUser and TestAuthBootstrap_PublicHexDerivation, executing live against postgres at 127.0.0.1:47001 with DATABASE_URL exported and migration 033_auth_per_user_bearer.sql applied via db.Migrate inside authTestPool. Live DB row-count evidence post-test: auth_users=1 (user-bootstrap-001 / bootstrap@integration-test / active), auth_tokens=1 (tok-bootstrap-001 / key-test-2026-05 / hashed_token length 64 chars = 32-byte HMAC-SHA-256 hex), auth_revocations=0. T1-06 BearerStore.Enroll duplicate-user adversarial sub-case PASSES live (UNIQUE constraint on auth_users.user_id surfaces a duplicate-key error matched by the test's strings.Contains(err.Error(), 'duplicate'|'unique') assertion). (Gate 4) go vet ./... exit=0; go vet -tags=integration ./tests/integration/... exit=0 — both clean. (Gate 5) bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh specs/044-per-user-bearer-auth PASSED — all required artifacts present, all DoD bullets carry evidence blocks, no fabrication signals. Side work: staged 3 gofmt-clean whitespace-only re-alignments in internal/auth/revocation/cache_test.go (column alignment of bootstrap-vs-refresh stub fixture), internal/auth/startup_test.go (gofmt-blank between consecutive doc-comment paragraphs), tests/integration/auth_bootstrap_test.go (gofmt-canonical numbered-list indentation in file-header comment). Both Uncertainty Declarations from the implement-phase block (DB migrations live execution + integration test live execution) are CLEARED — live execution evidence captured under Phase: test sub-blocks in scopes.md and report.md. Test stack left up for the validate-phase agent; teardown not invoked here. No t.Skip used. No --no-verify on the commit.
